name: Development feature: Command Bar voice input
description: Verify the voice-input control is exposed and either enters listening mode or reports a clear browser-permission/support error without breaking typed input.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign In button and wait for the dashboard to load
Press Control+K or Meta+K to open the Command Bar
Verify the Command Bar shows a voice button titled Gunakan input suara
Click the Gunakan input suara button and wait 3 seconds
Verify either the button enters listening state titled Hentikan perekaman suara, or a clear Indonesian Web Speech API, permission, or Kesalahan Input Suara message is shown
If listening started, click Hentikan perekaman suara. Then type Cek jadwal hari ini into the Command Bar input without submitting
Verify typed input remains usable and displays Cek jadwal hari ini after the voice interaction
